doctrine: Canonical supplement registry for Individual Supplement Optimizer v1. It records personal scheduling governance and heuristic benefit/burden vectors. It does not make medical claims.

supplements.name: Magnesium Citrate
supplements.notes: User protocol: required magnesium lane for NAD days; coordinate with other magnesium forms.

supplements.name: NMN-H
supplements.notes: High-voltage NAD lane; automatic selection must be conservative.

supplements.name: Melatonin
supplements.notes: Manual rescue lane only, not automatic daily advice.

supplements.name: Shilajit
supplements.notes: Quality-sensitive: hold if product identity/quality unknown.

supplements.name: Ashwagandha
supplements.notes: Personal exclusion from automatic scheduling due to liver concern.

supplements.name: Fadogia Agrestis
supplements.notes: Manual research lane only; never automatic.

supplements.name: Turkesterone
supplements.notes: Manual research lane only; never automatic.
